Version: v0.11.4

-- Hints for key items:
Academy Glintstone Key: In Liurnia
Carian Inverted Statue: In Limgrave - Stormfoot Catacombs
Rold Medallion: In Hidden Path to the Haligtree

-- Hints for bell bearings:
Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [1]: In Liurnia - Road's End Catacombs

-- End of hints

-- Spoilers:
Rold Medallion in Hidden Path to the Haligtree: In a chest behind the secret door. Replaces Golden Seed.
Star Shower in Limgrave: Sold by Sellen. Replaces Glintstone Pebble.
  (cost: 3500)
Ash of War: Carian Retaliation in Limgrave: Sold by the Nomadic Merchant between Saintsbridge and Summonwater Village. Replaces Cracked Pot.
Memory Stone in Limgrave: Sold by the Nomadic Merchant in the Mistwood along the road to Fort Haight. Replaces Sliver of Meat 5x.
  (cost: 500)
Hand of Malenia in Limgrave: Sold by the Nomadic Merchant between Saintsbridge and Summonwater Village. Replaces Halberd.
Glass Shard in Limgrave: Dropped by Demi-Human Chiefs. Replaces Sewing Needle.
Drop chance for 1: 0.1%
(1000)

-- End of item spoilers
